title: Blocker signal
description: Emitted by any agent when it encounters a situation requiring a human decision. Stored as .factory-state/blockers/B-NNN.json and surfaced in the dashboard with type-specific UI (PRD US-DA-008).

blocker_id.description: Stable blocker id, monotonically allocated within a project (B-001, B-002, …).

type.description: Drives which dashboard UI is rendered. Adding a new value requires a UI implementation in the dashboard's BlockerResolver/.

severity.description: informational = factory continues other work; blocks-phase = current phase paused, other phases may proceed; blocks-project = whole factory paused until resolved.

description.description: Human-readable explanation. Shown verbatim in the dashboard.

preview.description: Short preview text rendered alongside the option.

preview_path.description: Path to a file (image, markdown, json) used for richer preview rendering.

consequence.description: Short note on what choosing this option triggers.

options.description: Discrete choices for the operator. Empty/absent for free-form blockers.

context_files.description: Project-relative paths the operator may want to inspect when resolving.

raised_by.description: Agent name that emitted the blocker.

expires_at.description: Optional deadline by which a decision is needed (e.g. before a deploy window). Past expiry escalates to Level 3.

resolution.description: Set when the blocker is resolved. Until present, the blocker is pending.
